email.intro_daily: Here's what's new in your community today — {{count}} update(s) selected for you based on your sub-region and interests.
email.intro_weekly: Here's your weekly round-up — {{count}} update(s) selected for you based on your sub-region and interests.
email.empty: Nothing new in your community for now. We'll keep you posted.
email.footer: You're receiving this because you opted into the {{community}} civic digest. You can change cadence or opt out at any time.
